lessons: Grapple is highly effective against sword users under pickup_surge (9 kills in round 150, 6 in round 154) — prioritize grapple only when sword prevalence exceeds 60% in enemy weapon data.
Bow users (Deadeye, Ranger, Valkyrie) killed us 7 times in last 10 rounds — retreat immediately upon sighting them, especially in open areas or hazard_storm maps where mobility is crippled.
Viper (daggers) killed us in rounds 151 and 152 — never engage directly; grapple only if you can pull them into walls, corners, or environmental hazards.
Spear users (Valkyrie, Lancer) killed us 4 times in last 5 rounds — avoid direct confrontations; use shield users as cover or wait for hazard_storm to break line-of-sight.
Shield users appeared in 5 of last 10 rounds and never died to us — avoid initiating fights; let others engage them or use hazard_storm/environmental damage to weaken them.
Hazard_storm reduces our survival rate to 20% (4/5 losses) — grapple is lethal in this modifier; switch to sword or adopt defensive posture when it activates.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Grapple fails under hazard_storm and against bow/daggers users, while sword has proven lethal against dominant sword-wielding enemies and offers better survivability in close quarters.
